calendar.matters:
Motion To Vocate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Conchita Lozano-Batista telephone number 510-337-1001 for Petitioner Northern California District Counsel.
Defendant Cheryl Cole telephone number 925-285-7741 in Propria Persona.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Respondent Cheryl Cole's Motion to Vacate Default Judgment is treated as a motion to vacate the judgment confirming the arbitration award and, as so treated, is denied. There was no default judgment entered in this case. Rather there was a judgment confirming an arbitration award. Ms. Cole presents insufficient grounds to vacate the judgment. She appears to contend that she had no notice of the judgment until recently, but the clerk's minutes of August 12, 2011 reflect that she was present at the hearing where Judge Busch granted petitioner's petition to confirm the arbitration award. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CHERYL COLE, TEL. N0. (925) 285-7741 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.
